Gajwel's Most Trusted Car Battery Shop

If you're searching for "car battery near me" in Gajwel, Royal Batteries is your nearest authorized Exide CARE dealer. We understand that a dead battery can ruin your day, which is why we offer a 30-minute doorstep delivery and installation guarantee within Gajwel town.

Why Choose Us for Your Car Battery?

FAQ

Car Battery FAQs — Gajwel

How long does car battery delivery take in Gajwel?
Within Gajwel town, we deliver and install in 15–30 minutes. For surrounding villages, it takes 30–45 minutes.
Do you charge for car battery installation?
No, installation is free when you buy a new battery from Royal Batteries. We also provide free alternator/charging system checks.
Which car battery is best for my vehicle?
As an authorized Exide dealer, we recommend Exide Mileage for hatchbacks and Exide Matrix for SUVs. We also stock Amaron BXLife. Call us with your car model for specific advice.
